overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077), walking along a debris-strewn sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, crossing a busy intersection, and continuing along a multi-lane city street with futuristic architecture, palm trees, and moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with graffiti and urban debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure, passing discarded furniture and trash bags

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with support columns running parallel to the sidewalk
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
tall palm trees lining the street beyond the parked vehicles
futuristic high-rise buildings with reflective glass facades and neon signage
scattered trash bags, cardboard boxes, and discarded furniture along the wall
large digital billboard mounted on building facade displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person view walking along a debris-strewn sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway. A graffiti-covered retaining wall runs along the right side while futuristic glass skyscrapers rise in the distance. Palm trees and parked cars line the left side of the street. The environment is sheltered from direct sky exposure by the overpass above.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic control

events.description: approaching traffic light showing red signal at intersection
stepping onto yellow-striped crosswalk and beginning to cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection crosswalk, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking across the crosswalk from left to right
brown car waiting at the red traffic light

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals and yellow crosswalk sign
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
multi-story building with red medical cross signage and glass facade
green metal railings separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an open intersection as the camera approaches a traffic light. The medical center building becomes visible on the right. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, sharing the space with other pedestrians including a person in a yellow outfit. The graffiti wall recedes to the mid-ground as the perspective opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with moving traffic under elevated highway

events.description: weaving between moving vehicles including a white van and black sports car

agents.ego_description: moving along the street among moderate traffic, passing between vehicles and maintaining forward momentum

notable_agents.action: white delivery van driving slowly ahead in the same lane
green van passing by on the left side of the street

entered.detail: orange and white striped barriers lining the left side of the road
large concrete pillar supporting the elevated highway structure
elevated roadway crossing perpendicular in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera now moves along the asphalt street itself, weaving between moving traffic including a white van ahead and a green van passing on the left. The graffiti-covered retaining wall returns to the immediate right foreground. Construction barriers line the left side of the road as the camera continues beneath the elevated highway structure toward a distant overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban underpass through a bustling city intersection and back into a confined industrial corridor. It begins by walking along a debris-strewn sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, passing a graffiti-covered retaining wall and distant glass skyscrapers. As the camera approaches a traffic light, the environment opens up into a wide intersection where the perspective expands to reveal a medical center and pedestrians crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. The scene then shifts as the camera moves onto the asphalt street, weaving between a white van and a passing green van. Finally, the view narrows again as the graffiti wall returns to the immediate foreground and construction barriers line the left, continuing the path beneath the highway structure toward a distant overpass.
